## [00:00 - 00:33]

You ready to follow up? Got a customer? Don't know what to do? Let's get busy. Pick a day. Pick a day. Are you on day one, day two, day three? I need to know. What day you on? Time kills all deals. Pick a day. I don't care which one you pick. Get close. Let's do some follow-up.
